steps.title: Square the input value
steps.content:
The function $h$ uses the square of its input. Since $t=\sqrt{52}$,
$$t^2=(\sqrt{52})^2=52$$

steps.title: Finish with the second function
steps.content: Now use the value of $t^2$ in the rule for $h$: $$h(t)=4+\frac{52}{2}$$ $$h(t)=4+26=30$$ The answer is C.
